title: getloginrendersloginscreen
description: Verify that a GET request to /login returns a 200 status with the login HTML page and does not require authentication.

title: getdashboardrequiresauthentication
description: Verify that a GET request to /dashboard with a valid authenticated session returns a 200 status with the dashboard HTML page showing quick stats, inventory alerts, and recent transactions, and that requests without authentication are redirected to /login or receive unauthorized response.

title: getinventoryrequiresauthentication
description: Verify that a GET request to /inventory with a valid authenticated session returns a 200 status with the inventory HTML page showing parts list, stock levels, and barcode details, and that requests without authentication are blocked or redirected.

title: getlowstockrequiresauthentication
description: Verify that a GET request to /low-stock with a valid authenticated session returns a 200 status with the low-stock HTML page showing items below safety stock thresholds, and that requests without authentication are blocked or redirected.

title: getposrequiresauthentication
description: Verify that a GET request to /pos with a valid authenticated session returns a 200 status with the POS HTML page allowing customer selection, product addition, discounts, taxes, and payment confirmation, and that requests without authentication are blocked or redirected.

title: getsalesrequiresauthentication
description: Verify that a GET request to /sales with a valid authenticated session returns a 200 status with the sales HTML page showing sales history and invoice ledger entries, and that requests without authentication are blocked or redirected.

title: getpurchasesrequiresauthentication
description: Verify that a GET request to /purchases with a valid authenticated session returns a 200 status with the purchases HTML page showing purchase ledger entries and prior invoices, and that requests without authentication are blocked or redirected.

title: getpurchasesnewrequiresauthentication
description: Verify that a GET request to /purchases/new with a valid authenticated session returns a 200 status with the purchase form HTML page allowing supplier selection and purchase invoice preparation, and that requests without authentication are blocked or redirected.

title: getcustomersrequiresauthentication
description: Verify that a GET request to /customers with a valid authenticated session returns a 200 status with the customers HTML page showing customer directory and statement details, and that requests without authentication are blocked or redirected.

title: getsettingsrequiresauthentication
description: Verify that a GET request to /settings with a valid authenticated session returns a 200 status with the settings HTML page allowing updates to global settings, user preferences, and printer options, and that requests without authentication are blocked or redirected.
